simple_process.title: Get your market price in 4 steps
simple_process.subtitle: From details to suggested price — clear, fair, and fast.

01.title: Submit your car details
01.desc: Tell us your model, year, mileage and any key condition notes.

02.title: Share photos & condition
02.desc: Send clear photos so we can understand your car accurately.

03.title: We compare the market
03.desc: We benchmark against current listings and demand to estimate a fair range.

04.title: Receive your suggested price
04.desc: We contact you with a market-based suggested price and next steps to list.

one.title: Market data, fair guidance
one.subtitle: A suggested price based on real comparisons — explained clearly.

two.title: Listing help & secure paperwork
two.subtitle: If you proceed, we help you list with confidence and clarity.

01.q: What information do I need to submit?
01.a: Your brand/model, year, mileage, license, and clear photos of exterior/interior help us estimate accurately.

02.a: It’s a market-based guidance range. Final selling price can vary depending on condition, documents, and buyer demand.

03.q: How long does the process take?
03.a: Most price guidance responses are shared within 24 hours after receiving complete details and photos.

04.q: Do I have to sell with Kyaw Kyar?
04.a: No. You can use the suggested market price as guidance. If you want, we can help you list and sell smoothly.
